ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the passenger */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the passenger */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the passenger */,
  "pclass" INTEGER /* Passenger class (1st, 2nd, or 3rd) */,
  "sibsp" INTEGER /* Number of siblings/spouses aboard */,
  "parch" INTEGER /* Number of parents/children aboard */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Survival status (1 if survived, 0 if not) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the passenger */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the passenger */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "passport_number" TEXT /* Passport number of the passenger */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the passenger */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Medical conditions of the passenger */,
  "dietary_preferences" TEXT /* Dietary preferences of the passenger */,
  "loyalty_program_member" INTEGER /* Indicates if the passenger is a member of the loyalty program */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Number of loyalty points the passenger has */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the passenger record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the passenger record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cabins" (
  "cabin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cabin */,
  "cabin_number" TEXT /* Cabin number assigned to the passenger */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the passenger assigned to this cabin */,
  "embarked" TEXT /* Port of embarkation (e.g., S for Southampton) */,
  "has_cabin" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the cabin is assigned (true/false) */,
  "deck" TEXT /* Deck number of the cabin */,
  "cabin_type" TEXT /* Type of the cabin (e.g., suite, balcony, interior) */,
  "cabin_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of passengers the cabin can accommodate */,
  "available" INTEGER /* Indicates if the cabin is available for booking */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the cabin record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the cabin record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cabin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cabins_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the passenger who purchased the ticket */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid for the ticket */,
  "ticket_number" TEXT /* Unique ticket number for tracking purposes */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date when the ticket was booked */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the fare was paid */,
  "discount_applied" REAL /* Discount applied to the fare */,
  "booking_reference" TEXT /* Unique booking reference number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the ticket record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the ticket record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "embarkation" (
  "embarkation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each embarkation record */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the passenger embarking */,
  "embarkation_port" TEXT /* Port where the passenger embarked (e.g., S for Southampton) */,
  "embarkation_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the passenger embarked */,
  "disembarkation_port" TEXT /* Port where the passenger will disembark */,
  "disembarkation_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the passenger will disembark */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the embarkation record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the embarkation record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("embarkation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_embarkation_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)
